description: Hong Kong Monetary Authority funding monitor — Aggregate Balance, HIBOR curve, USD/HKD peg distance to 7.85, Base Rate, HIBOR-SOFR spread from HKMA Open API (free) + FRED + FMP. The offshore-USD/Asia funding tell. Output data/hkma.json. Daily 09:00 UTC (before eurodollar-plumbing 12:00).
